final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for a social media cover (Xiaohongshu/小红书), announcing GPT-image-2 launch on the Lovart platform.

Style/medium: editorial magazine cover aesthetic, high-fashion publication layout, clean typography-driven design
Composition: diagonal composition with dynamic visual flow, text and graphic elements arranged along diagonal axis, balanced negative space
Subject: announcement of "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart" as dual focal points, modern tech-art collaboration theme
Scene/backdrop: minimal editorial backdrop, abstract gradient or solid color field to emphasize typography
Lighting/mood: high contrast lighting with dramatic shadows, bold and confident mood
Color palette: high-contrast accent color scheme, one bold accent color against neutral base, editorial sophistication
Text (verbatim): "GPT-image-2" "Lovart"
Constraints: must work as 3:4 vertical cover format; text must remain legible at thumbnail size
Avoid: generic tech startup gradients; cluttered layouts; low contrast color schemes; stock photo aesthetics; 8K stuffer words
